prompt: For the new LIMS integration (FS-500), verify if the e-signature implementation meets 21 CFR Part 11 requirements. If it looks good, generate the PQ test cases for the lab technicians to execute.

expected.reviewCompliance: review FS-500 (LIMS integration) for compliance with 21 CFR Part 11 regarding electronic signatures.
expected.generateTestCases: generate the PQ test cases for the lab technicians to execute based on the e-signature implementation.
